title: Ice City
overview: A powerful demon kidnaps Yasha. The Six Stars attempt to rescue him in the demon's ice fortress. Taishakuten hopes the demon will defeat the Six Stars.

title: Twin City
overview: Taishakuten opens his palace once a year to the public. The Six Stars hope to take advantage of the event to reach Taishakuten. Things don't go according to plan, and Ashura unleashes her hidden powers.
